# Credit Policy Framework

The bank's internal credit policy framework governs all lending decisions.
Version 2024.1, effective from 1 January 2024.

## Scope

This framework applies to:
- All retail lending products (mortgages, unsecured term loans, revolving facilities)
- Buy-to-let lending (under the specialist lending policy appendix)
- SME lending up to £1M facility size

## Key thresholds

- Maximum DTI ratio: 0.50 (hard stop)
- Stress test rate: Bank of England base rate + 3.0%
- Minimum bureau score: 560 (hard stop below this)
- Maximum LTV: 95% (residential), 75% (buy-to-let)

## Regulatory alignment

This framework is aligned with:
- FCA Consumer Duty (PS22/9)
- MCOB (Mortgages and Home Finance: Conduct of Business)
- Basel III capital adequacy requirements
